dhp273:1: Of paths, the eightfold is best.
dhp273:4: Of two-footed beings, the one with the eyes to see.
dhp274:1: Just this is the path –there is no other–
dhp274:4: and that will be Mara’s bewilderment.
dhp275:2: you put an end to suffering & stress.
dhp275:3: I have taught you this path
dhp275:4: having known –for your knowing– the extraction of arrows.
dhp276:1: It’s for you to strive ardently.
dhp276:2: Tathagatas simply point out the way.
dhp276:4:
absorbed in jhana:
from Mara’s bonds they’ll be freed.
dhp277:4: This is the path to purity.
dhp278:1:
When you see with discernment,
‘All fabrications are stressful’–
dhp278:4: This is the path to purity.
dhp279:4: This is the path to purity.
dhp280:1: At the time for initiative he takes no initiative.
dhp280:3: the resolves of his heart exhausted, the lazy, lethargic one
dhp281:1: Guarded in speech, well-restrained in mind,
dhp281:2: you should do nothing unskillful in body.
dhp281:3: Purify these three courses of action.
dhp281:4: Bring to fruition the path that seers have proclaimed.
dhp283:1: Cut down the forest of desire, not the forest of trees.
dhp283:2: From the forest of desire come danger & fear.
dhp283:3: Having cut down this forest & its underbrush, monks,
dhp284:1: For as long as the least bit of underbrush
dhp284:2: of a man for women is not cleared away,
dhp284:4: like a suckling calf on its mother.
dhp285:2: like an autumn lily in the hand.
dhp285:3: Nurture only the path to peace
dhp285:4: –Unbinding– as taught by the One Well Gone.
dhp287:2:
all tangled up in the mind:
death sweeps him away–
dhp287:3: as a great flood, a village asleep.
dhp288:1: There are no sons to give shelter,
dhp288:3: for one seized by the Ender,
dhp289:2: the wise man, restrained by virtue,
dhp289:4: –right away– that goes all the way to Unbinding.
